text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's New Year's Day, and I've brought Winning
Ticket along for our first shrine visit of the year.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I hope I can do my absolute best and work toward
my goals with my trainer this year!
choice_data_list:
(I hope that Ticket will continue to be happy
and healthy this year.)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Okay, prayer's done! I'm gonna go all out and
have an amazing year!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh, right! Trainer, what did you wish for?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: To win lots of races? Or to get stronger?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not wanting to lie to Ticket, I admit to my real
wish.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: For me... to be happy and healthy?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sob... I'm s-so... touched...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That's really kind... Sob... You made a wish... for meeee...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna go say another prayer to wish for your
health too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I can stop her, she rejoins the long line for
a second round of prayers.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All right! I made a wish for you to be healthy too!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm feeling so pumped right now!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You gotta give me some training to do! Running a
full marathon, hauling a tire the size of a
house—you name it, I'll ace it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It would be a shame to waste her enthusiasm, so
I'd better come up with a suggestion...
choice_data_list: Let's go all out on relaxing!

Let's let's go all out and pull a New Year's
fortune!
Let's go all out and learn a new skill!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Go all out... relaxing?! But how? Aren't we going
to practice?
choice_data_list: Let's rest today and fully recover our strength!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, that makes sense! Got it! I'm gonna take a
super good nap today!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: First I'll sprint back to my room at top speed!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: WOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I can call her back, she dashes off toward
the academy...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In any case, I feel sure that this is going to be an
important year for her.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Go all out pulling a fortune? Hah! Leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Great fortune, great fortune! Come ooon, great
fortune!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And she winds up pulling a...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoooaaaah! I got it! I got a "great fortune"!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In any case, I feel sure that this is going to be an
important year for her!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: A new skill? Haha! Sounds great!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Only problem is... you know, um... learning? I'm...
kinda not very good at that.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Wait, no! I can't say that when I just decided I'd
work hard!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Okay, then first things first...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I gotta head to the bookstore and go all out
finding a good reference book!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ta-DAAA! If I wanna go all out studying, I'd
better use a textbook that's a teensy bit on the
difficult side!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... "On the effects of environmental
factors on Type I and Type II muscle fibers: a
biome... chanical... analysis..."

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yawn... So... sleepy...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In any case, I feel sure that this is going to be an
important year for her!
